name: AWS IAM Instance Profile Associated With an Instance
description: This model monitors instances where an IAM instance profile is linked with an instance in AWS. This alert signifies that a specific instance now has access permissions determined by an IAM instance profile. The potential impact includes the risk of direct privilege escalation to a different EC2 role.

rules.name: AWS IAM Instance Profile Associated With an Instance

author: Srivathsa H S and Sunil Bharti
